sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102102" key="sw=tron" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῶτρον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n102102.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wooden felloe of the wheel</tr_> (the iron hoop or tire being <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐπίσωτρον</foreign>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:144" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.144</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:53" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.53</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σωτεύματα</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
